get_album_title: SELECT a.Title From Album a WHERE a.AlbumId =?
get_customer_data: Select c.* FROM Customer c WHERE c.CustomerId =?
set_new_customer: INSERT INTO ap_user (first_name, last_name, email, phone, address, city, country) VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?,?);
get_customer_id_by_email: SELECT au.id FROM ap_user au WHERE au.email =?
get_random_customer_user_and_password_ol: SELECT au.email, ca.password_hash FROM ap_user au JOIN CustomerAuth ca ON au.id = ca.app_user_id WHERE ca.active =1 and ca.suspended =0 ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1;
get_nimber_of_cart_items_qty: SELECT sum(ci.quantity) FROM ap_user au JOIN Cart c on au.id =c.user_id  join CartItems ci ON c.cart_id =ci.cart_id where au.email  like ?
get_cart_item_qty_and_total_price: SELECT p.name ,sum(ci.quantity) as itemsQty ,p.price,sum(ci.quantity *p.price) as totalPrice FROM ap_user au JOIN Cart c on au.id =c.user_id join CartItems ci ON c.cart_id =ci.cart_id JOIN Products p ON ci.product_id =p.product_id where au.email like ?;
get_user_data_by_user_name: SELECT pssu.* FROM Pet_store_swagger_users pssu where RANDOM() and pssu.user_status =1 LIMIT 1;
get_user_name_tht_dont_exist: SELECT pssu.user_bame FROM Pet_store_swagger_users pssu where pssu.user_status =0;
get_random_customer_user_and_password: select u.email,u.password FROM Users u where u.is_active =? ORDER BY RANDOM() limit 1;
